title: sclerolepis verticillata
intro: Sclerolepis verticillata, also known as whorled rosinweed or whorled rosinweed, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb that is native to North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Sclerolepis verticillata can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
